violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the (kitchen ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The (ceilings ) in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair.Observed water stains and missing and/or damaged tiles. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
